ddls:
CREATE TABLE "professionals" (
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax professional */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tax professional */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company name of the tax professional */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the tax professional */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the tax professional is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the tax professional is located */,
  "profession" TEXT /* Profession of the tax professional (e.g., accountant, chartered accountant, tax preparation service) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the tax professional */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the tax professional */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the tax professional */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography or professional summary */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or file path to the professional's profile picture */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications and qualifications */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Average rating of the professional */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the professional's account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the professional's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the professional's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax professional the office belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the office */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the office */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the office */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the office */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude for geolocation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude for geolocation */,
  "is_main_office" INTEGER /* Indicates if the office is the main office of the firm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the office was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the office was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offices_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "price" TEXT /* Standard price for the service */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of the service in minutes */,
  "isFeatured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is featured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professional_services" (
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax professional */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service offered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Custom price for the service offered by the professional */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was associated with the professional */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professional_id", "service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the client */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the client */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax professional */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, confirmed, completed, canceled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the appointment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the appointment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the appointment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appointment the document belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, XLSX, DOCX) */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appointment the payment belongs to */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who left the review */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax professional being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the client (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the review was left */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is flagged for review by an administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, tax professional, client) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
